summary: Iteration 27: P2 Renewal Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend: 6/6 tests. Frontend: All UI features verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Renewal feature is fully functional. The renew endpoint accepts new_membership and new_member_type fields, and auto-adds to active challenge if membership contains 'challenge'.

feature_1_renew_modal_opens_correctly.description: Renew modal opens with member name and expiration date displayed

evidence.member_name_displayed: Camille Roux (first test), Lucas Moreau (second test)
evidence.expiration_date_format: Expire le: DD mois YYYY (French locale)

feature_2_changer_abonnement_toggle.description: 'Changer d'abonnement' toggle reveals membership type and member type selectors

feature_3_membership_type_dropdown.description: New membership type can be selected from dropdown after enabling toggle

feature_4_renouveler_button_blue.description: Renouveler button is BLUE (accent color) - bg-[var(--color-accent)]

feature_5_renew_api_updates_membership.description: POST /api/members/{id}/renew with new_membership field updates member's membership type

evidence.get_verification: membership and member_type fields updated correctly

feature_6_auto_add_to_challenge.description: When renewing with challenge-type membership, member auto-added to active challenge

feature_7_expiring_members_prominent_but.description: Members expiring within 30 days show prominent blue 'Renouveler' button with text

feature_8_non_expiring_icon_button.description: Non-expiring members show smaller icon-only renew button

feature_9_fire_emoji_challenge_members.description: Fire emoji shows for challenge members in members list

evidence.emoji_position: next to membership text in table cell
